message:
🐛 Fix EAC-3 audio playback on non-standard MPEG-TS streams (#74)

- Add ad-lavc-o=strict=-2 to allow non-standard codec tags (e.g. 0x0087)
- Increase demuxer probe size/duration for proper EAC-3 detection
- Fixes silent audio on streams using E-AC-3 with non-standard tags

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
